HTTP Error 401.0 - Unauthorized

You do not have permission to view this directory or page.

Most likely causes:

  • The authenticated user does not have access to a resource needed to process the request.

Things you can try:

  • Create a tracing rule to track failed requests for this HTTP status code. For more information about creating a tracing rule for failed requests, click here.

Detailed Error Information:

Module   ManagedPipelineHandler
Notification   ExecuteRequestHandler
Handler   AdvancedUtility.Web.Dnn.AccountSelector.SessionBasedControllerHandler
Error Code   0x00000000
Requested URL   https://water-billing.ottawa.ca:443/en-ca/API/AdvancedUtility/AccountSelector/selector/preload
Physical Path   D:\inetpub\linkV4\en-ca\API\AdvancedUtility\AccountSelector\selector\preload
Logon Method   Anonymous
Logon User   Anonymous

More Information:

This is the generic Access Denied error returned by IIS. Typically, there is a substatus code associated with this error that describes why the server denied the request. Check the IIS Log file to determine whether a substatus code is associated with this failure.

View more information »
